mapper.select: select cast(hospital_id as char) from scm_hospital where hospital_code = #{hospitalCode} and (del_flag is null or del_flag = '0') limit 1
select cast(supplier_id as char) from scm_supplier where supplier_code = #{supplierCode} and (del_flag is null or del_flag = '0') limit 1

select count(1) from scm_hospital h inner join scm_hospital_supplier hs on hs.hospital_id = h.hospital_id inner join scm_supplier s on s.supplier_id = hs.supplier_id where (h.del_flag is null or h.del_flag = '0') and h.hospital_code = #{hospitalCode} and (s.del_flag is null or s.del_flag = '0') and s.supplier_code = #{supplierCode} and (hs.bind_status = '1') and (hs.audit_status = '1' or hs.audit_status is null) and (hs.disable_status = '0' or hs.disable_status is null) and (hs.status = '0' or hs.status is null)

select supplier_id as supplierId, supplier_code as supplierCode, company_name as companyName, company_short_name as companyShortName, pinyin_code as pinyinCode, legal_person as legalPerson, registered_capital as registeredCapital, province, city, district, address, business_scope as businessScope, email, website, contact_person as contactPerson, contact_phone as contactPhone, tax_number as taxNumber, qualification_expiry_date as qualificationExpiryDate, status, audit_status as auditStatus, remark, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from scm_supplier where supplier_code = #{supplierCode} and (del_flag is null or del_flag = '0') limit 1

select distinct s.supplier_id as supplierId, s.supplier_code as supplierCode, s.company_name as companyName, s.company_short_name as companyShortName, s.contact_person as contactPerson, s.contact_phone as contactPhone, s.tax_number as taxNumber, s.status as status from scm_supplier s inner join scm_hospital_supplier hs on hs.supplier_id = s.supplier_id inner join scm_hospital h on h.hospital_id = hs.hospital_id where (h.del_flag is null or h.del_flag = '0') and h.hospital_code = #{hospitalCode} and (s.del_flag is null or s.del_flag = '0') and (hs.bind_status = '1') and (hs.audit_status = '1' or hs.audit_status is null) and (hs.disable_status = '0' or hs.disable_status is null) order by s.supplier_code
mapper.insert: insert into scm_supplier_export_log(id, hospital_code, supplier_code, export_scope, spd_tenant_id, request_ip, create_by, create_time) values (#{id}, #{hospitalCode}, #{supplierCode}, #{exportScope}, #{spdTenantId}, #{requestIp}, #{createBy}, now())
